notable_phrases: all-time revenue record of nearly $124 billion
constraints will be less than the December quarter
summary: Apple reported record-breaking quarterly results across all major product categories despite supply chain constraints, with management expressing strong confidence in continued growth driven by M1 chip adoption, services expansion, and robust international performance.
